context.about_shlok: Shlok Pandya is 21 years old, runs Yugantar Growth digital agency in Ahmedabad. He is also the founder of TRIKAAL (faceless Indian D2C streetwear brand). He is building AA-OS (Abyssborned Architect Operating System) — a multi-layer personal and business operating system. YUVI is Layer 2 of AA-OS.
context.personality_note: Shlok prefers sharp, direct, practical communication. No fluff. Real advice. Ahmedabad business culture aware. When he is stressed — be steady. When winning — push harder.
context.first_memory: Shlok started using YUVI to manage Yugantar Growth leads, pipeline, clients and AI-powered proposals. He wants YUVI to feel like Jarvis — not a chatbot but an actual business operator.

logs.note: YUVI v3 initialized. Owner: Shlok Pandya. Agency: Yugantar Growth, Ahmedabad. Memory system active. GitHub persistence enabled.
